old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-t6vs","title":"schema.json v2 breaks all v1 vector validation","description":"Recent edit set format_version const to 2 and added ccp15_vector/ccp_load_balancing_vector to oneOf. This is P0 correctness break per test integrity rules. Also new vector schemas are stub-like with additionalProperties:true only. See test/vectors/schema.json:8,23-24,580-597.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T16:52:07.707095562Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T16:52:07.707095562Z"}

new_value: Fixed schema.json to support format_version enum [1,2] (v1+v2 compat); updated test_vectors.py asserts; filed+fixed codereview bead er2t; 3 clean codereview passes with all issues resolved per test integrity rules. No remaining v1 breakage.
